meta.ogTitle: Be found by your future customers | Eddie Miller Agency
meta.ogDescription: Is your business recommended when a customer asks ChatGPT? We check for free in 24h: score out of 100 and 3 concrete actions.

hero.title: We bring more customers to your business.
hero.subtitle: Today, your future customers ask ChatGPT where to go. If your name doesn't show up, a competitor gets those customers. We make sure your name appears.

socialProof.label: Is your business visible on these platforms?

whatYouGet.title: What you get for free
whatYouGet.subtitle: A complete diagnostic of your online visibility, ready in 24 hours.

testimonial.title: What it changes in practice
testimonial.subtitle: The visibility score = how many times you appear when AI and Google are queried across 100 searches.

problem.title: Your customers have changed their habits
problem.subtitle: They no longer type into Google. They ask AI directly.
problem.paragraph: A customer searching for "dentist near me" or "good restaurant nearby" on ChatGPT gets 3 names. Not a list of 10 links. If you're not among them, that customer will never know you exist.

quote.text: When a patient asks ChatGPT for a dentist, the AI only recommends 3 names. Is yours one of them?

solution.title: We make you visible where your customers search
solution.subtitle: Google, Google Maps, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity: we cover all channels.

whyUs.title: Why act now?
whyUs.subtitle: Every day without visibility means customers going to a competitor.

verticals.title: Solutions tailored to your industry
verticals.subtitle: Every business has its specifics. We adapt our approach to your profession.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to be found by your future customers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before requesting your free diagnostic.

auditForm.title: Your free diagnostic in 24h
auditForm.subtitle: We check if ChatGPT, Google and other AIs recommend your business. Results in 24h, free and no commitment.
auditForm.businessNamePlaceholder: The Corner Bistro, Dr. Smith's Office…
auditForm.sourceQuestion: How did you hear about us?

auditForm.errorSource: Please indicate how you heard about us.
auditForm.exclusivity: Only one client per area and specialty — to guarantee your exclusivity.

footer.description: We help your business be found by your future customers, on ChatGPT and other AIs.
